title: Blocko Pack
description: Official Zyblocko resource pack for 1.21.11 featuring short swords, cobweb outlines, smooth crystals, small items, one pixel fire, and custom totem textures with my skin.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/FvdrewZ9UjI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe><iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/FvdrewZ9UjI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
The official resource pack for the Zyblocko brand. This pack is a high-performance, minimalist PvP pack designed for maximum visibility and clean aesthetics.
CORE FEATURES

    Short swords for better combo visibility.

    Cobweb outline with high-contrast borders.

    Smooth end crystal for a minimalist design.

    Smaller held items to clear up your screen.

    One pixel fire for better sight during fights.

    Custom totem featuring the official Zyblocko skin.

    Golden apples with custom grey, white, and red textures.

    Bow and crossbow charge color with green being the lowest charge,yellow being the half charged and  red as full charge.

    Smaller particals for pvp.

    No vignette and carved pumpkin blur.
